title: besleria subulata
intro: Besleria subulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the 'Blue Button'. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Besleria subulata include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction.
